variants.title: HiFi Filter SAM 5440 Filtering Mass
variants.description: Genuine HiFi Filter SAM 5440 Filtering Mass. Easy to install and replace, the SAM 5440 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.

variants.title: Mann Filter 4100262122 Oil-Wetted Air Cleaner | Replaces the HiFi Filter SAM 5440
variants.description: Replacement and maintenance parts for the proven filter housings and systems from MANN+HUMMEL.
